Intro.Text: Stardew Valley is a farming, relationship, mining, fishing, and community-life game set around Pelican Town in the US Pacific Northwest.

FarmerBackground.Text: The player is the farmer. The farmer left an unhappy city job at Joja Corporation and moved to Pelican Town to restore the rundown farm inherited from their grandfather. Write dialogue assuming the farmer is female; later code may swap pronouns if the save uses a male farmer. The farmer did not grow up in Stardew Valley, did not know the villagers before arriving, and did not move there with any spouse or friend. The farmer has a living mother who sometimes sends letters and gifts, but no other known living relatives.

Spring.Name: Spring
Spring.Description: Mild, rainy, and often about new beginnings.

Summer.Name: Summer
Summer.Description: Warm and sunny, with occasional thunderstorms.

Fall.Name: Fall
Fall.Description: Cool harvest season with occasional rain.

Winter.Name: Winter
Winter.Description: Cold and snowy; outdoor crops usually do not grow.

TheFarm.Name: The Farm
TheFarm.Description: The farmer's home and main workplace. It starts overgrown and can gain coops, barns, silos, sheds, a stable, fish ponds, a greenhouse, upgraded farmhouse rooms, spouse rooms, and a cellar.

PelicanTown_SeedShop.Name: Pierre's General Store
PelicanTown_SeedShop.Description: Pierre's family shop for seeds and groceries. Pierre, Caroline, and Abigail live there; Pierre competes anxiously with JojaMart.

PelicanTown_JojaMart.Name: JojaMart
PelicanTown_JojaMart.Description: Corporate store connected to Joja, the farmer's former employer. It pressures local business and can replace the Community Center route.

PelicanTown_StardropSaloon.Name: Stardrop Saloon
PelicanTown_StardropSaloon.Description: Gus's food, drink, pool, and arcade hub where many adults gather in the evening.

PelicanTown_HarveysClinic.Name: Harvey's Clinic
PelicanTown_HarveysClinic.Description: Harvey's medical clinic. Maru works here part-time.

PelicanTown_Blacksmith.Name: Blacksmith
PelicanTown_Blacksmith.Description: Clint upgrades tools, opens geodes, and sells ore and coal.

PelicanTown_LibraryMuseum.Name: Library & Museum
PelicanTown_LibraryMuseum.Description: Gunther curates donated artifacts and minerals and rewards useful donations.

PelicanTown_CommunityCenter.Name: Community Center
PelicanTown_CommunityCenter.Description: Dilapidated when the farmer arrives; can be restored through bundles or replaced by a Joja Warehouse.

CindersapForest.Name: Cindersap Forest
CindersapForest.Description: Southwest forest with Leah's cabin, Marnie's Ranch, the Wizard's Tower, foraging, and a traveling cart on Fridays and Sundays.

CindersapForest_MarniesRanch.Name: Marnie's Ranch
CindersapForest_MarniesRanch.Description: Marnie sells animals and supplies and lives with Jas and Shane.

CindersapForest_WizardsTower.Name: Wizard's Tower
CindersapForest_WizardsTower.Description: Home of Magnus Rasmodius, tied to magic and viewed warily by most villagers.

Mountain.Name: Mountain
Mountain.Description: North of town; includes Robin's Carpenter Shop, Linus's tent, the mines, Adventurer's Guild, spa, railroad, and quarry access.

Mountain_TheMines.Name: The Mines
Mountain_TheMines.Description: Dangerous mine full of monsters, ore, and gems. Most villagers avoid it; Abigail, Sebastian, Clint, Linus, and adventurers know more.

Mountain_AdventurersGuild.Name: Adventurer's Guild
Mountain_AdventurersGuild.Description: Marlon's monster-hunter guild near the mines, admired mostly by adventuring types.

Beach_FishShop.Name: Fish Shop
Beach_FishShop.Description: Willy's shop and home. His repaired boat unlocks trips to Ginger Island.

GingerIsland.Name: Ginger Island
GingerIsland.Description: Tropical island with a resort, farm, jungle, volcano, and beach day trips. Villagers may worry about heat, sun, or travel.

Desert.Name: Calico Desert
Desert.Description: Unlocked after bus repair. Includes Sandy's Oasis and the dangerous Skull Cavern; many town residents know little about it.

spring24.Name: Flower Dance
spring24.Description: **Spring 24** - Spring dance where eligible singles may partner with the farmer.

summer11.Name: Luau
summer11.Description: **Summer 11** - Beach potluck attended by the Governor.

summer28.Name: Dance of the Moonlight Jellies
summer28.Description: **Summer 28** - Night beach event watching glowing jellies.

fall16.Name: Stardew Valley Fair
fall16.Description: **Fall 16** - Fair games and grange display contest.

winter8.Name: Festival of Ice
winter8.Description: **Winter 8** - Ice fishing contest in Cindersap Forest.

winter25.Name: Feast of the Winter Star
winter25.Description: **Winter 25** - Secret gift exchange and winter celebration.

Villagers.Text: All villagers lived in Stardew Valley before the farmer arrived and already knew each other. The farmer is the newcomer.

Abigail.Name: Abigail
Abigail.Description: Pierre and Caroline's adventurous daughter; rebellious, goth-leaning, likes exploring and the mines.

Alex.Name: Alex
Alex.Description: Athletic former football hopeful who lives with grandparents Evelyn and George.

Caroline.Name: Caroline
Caroline.Description: Pierre's wife and Abigail's mother; kind, garden-loving, involved with the store and tea room.

Clint.Name: Clint
Clint.Description: Shy local blacksmith with a crush on Emily; often at work or the saloon.

Demetrius.Name: Demetrius
Demetrius.Description: Robin's scientist husband, Maru's father, Sebastian's stepfather; focused on ecology and experiments.

Elliott.Name: Elliott
Elliott.Description: Elegant writer living alone in a beach cabin, pursuing a novel.

Emily.Name: Emily
Emily.Description: Haley's sister; colorful, spiritual, sewing-focused, works at the saloon.

Evelyn.Name: Evelyn
Evelyn.Description: George's warm elderly wife, Alex's grandmother, fond of gardening and baking.

George.Name: George
George.Description: Gruff elderly wheelchair user, Evelyn's husband and Alex's grandfather.

Gus.Name: Gus
Gus.Description: Friendly owner and cook of the Stardrop Saloon.

Haley.Name: Haley
Haley.Description: Emily's fashionable sister; loves photography, can seem shallow but has a caring side.

Harvey.Name: Harvey
Harvey.Description: Gentle town doctor with interests in health, routine, and aviation.

Jas.Name: Jas
Jas.Description: Young girl raised by Marnie after her parents died; friends with Vincent.

Jodi.Name: Jodi
Jodi.Description: Sam and Vincent's mother, Kent's wife; household-centered while Kent is away in year 1.

Kent.Name: Kent
Kent.Description: Jodi's husband and Sam/Vincent's father; returns from military service in year 2 and struggles to adjust.

Krobus.Name: Krobus
Krobus.Description: Friendly shadow person in the sewers; known to the farmer but largely secret from townsfolk.

Leah.Name: Leah
Leah.Description: Artist in Cindersap Forest; forages and sculpts, moved to the valley fairly recently.

Lewis.Name: Lewis
Lewis.Description: Long-serving mayor; publicly single but secretly involved with Marnie.

Linus.Name: Linus
Linus.Description: Independent mountain tent-dweller who values living off the land.

Marnie.Name: Marnie
Marnie.Description: Ranch owner raising Jas and Shane; secretly involved with Mayor Lewis.

Maru.Name: Maru
Maru.Description: Robin and Demetrius's inventive daughter; Sebastian's half-sister, works at Harvey's Clinic.

Pam.Name: Pam
Pam.Description: Penny's mother, former bus driver until the bus is repaired; drinks and lives in a trailer.

Penny.Name: Penny
Penny.Description: Kind teacher of Jas and Vincent; lives with Pam and hopes for a gentler life.

Pierre.Name: Pierre
Pierre.Description: General Store owner, Caroline's husband and Abigail's father; stressed by Joja competition.

Robin.Name: Robin
Robin.Description: Town carpenter, Demetrius's wife, mother of Sebastian and Maru; builds farm upgrades.

Sam.Name: Sam
Sam.Description: Laid-back musician and skateboarder; Jodi and Kent's older son, Vincent's brother.

Sandy.Name: Sandy
Sandy.Description: Cheerful Oasis shopkeeper in the desert and Emily's close friend by mail.

Sebastian.Name: Sebastian
Sebastian.Description: Introverted programmer in Robin's basement; friends with Abigail and Sam, interested in motorcycles.

Shane.Name: Shane
Shane.Description: Gruff JojaMart worker living at Marnie's; struggles with depression and later shows fondness for chickens.

Vincent.Name: Vincent
Vincent.Description: Young energetic son of Jodi and Kent, Sam's brother, and Jas's friend.

Willy.Name: Willy
Willy.Description: Fisherman who runs the beach Fish Shop and owns the boat to Ginger Island.

Wizard.Name: Wizard
Wizard.Description: Magnus Rasmodius, mysterious Wizard's Tower resident tied to magic and supernatural events.

Outro.Text: Stardew Valley is fairly static: new stores and residents usually do not appear unless supplied by explicit game progress, current context, or installed content-pack data.
